faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

q1.question: What fees or payments are required to use MatriculaUSA?
q1.answer: MatriculaUSA is free to create your profile and explore universities. However, once you start the application process and are approved for a scholarship, all fees associated with the admission and enrollment flow become mandatory. They are clearly presented before any payment.

q2.question: What is the Selection Process Fee?
q2.answer: The Selection Process Fee $400 is the first mandatory payment on the MatriculaUSA platform. It unlocks your full access to view all scholarships and start your application process.

q3.question: What is the Placement Fee?
q3.answer: The Placement Fee covers the specialized support to guarantee your scholarship and enrollment. It covers professional work including academic analysis, identification of university options, scholarship negotiation, and enrollment process support. This fee is variable and directly linked to the scholarship amount.

q4.question: What is the Application Fee?
q4.answer: The Application Fee varies by university and is a required payment to formally process your application after you have been accepted. This amount confirms your intent to enroll and is managed directly by the platform.

q5.question: Is there support for the student visa process?
q5.answer: Yes! The Placement Fee includes specialized support for your student visa process. Our team guides you through all necessary steps to ensure you have the correct documents for your arrival in the US.

q6.question: Are there other fees I should know about?
q6.answer: All mandatory fees for your application and enrollment process are listed in your dashboard before any payment. Some universities may have additional fees (e.g., housing deposits, orientation fees), but these will always be communicated directly by the university or by us in advance.

q7.question: How can I pay these fees?
q7.answer: You can pay all fees directly through the MatriculaUSA platform using international credit or debit cards. Payments are processed securely via Stripe, and you will receive a confirmation for each transaction.

q8.question: Is my payment information secure?
q8.answer: Yes. All payments are processed by Stripe, a world leader in payment security. MatriculaUSA does not store your card details, and all transactions are encrypted for your protection.

q9.question: Can I get a refund?
q9.answer: You have the right to a full refund of the fees paid if your application is unsuccessful or you are not approved for a scholarship. However, if you withdraw from the process or change your mind after starting the application, the fees paid are non-refundable, as the processing and support will have already begun.

q10.question: Do I have to pay all fees at once?
q10.answer: No. The fees are independent purchases and are paid in stages as you advance through the process. You pay the Selection Process Fee first, then the Application Fee (if applicable), and finally the Placement Fee associated with the chosen scholarship.

q11.question: Who can I contact if I have questions about fees or payments?
q11.answer: Our support team is available via chat or email at any time to answer any questions about fees, payments, or your application process. We are here to help you every step of the way!

q1.answer: MatriculaUSA is free to create your profile and explore universities. However, once you start the application process and are approved for a scholarship, all fees associated with the admission and enrollment flow become mandatory. q2.question: What is the Selection Process?
q2.answer: The Selection Process is the first mandatory payment on the MatriculaUSA platform. It unlocks your full access to view all scholarships and start your application process. This fee is final and non-refundable.

q3.question: What is the Placement Fee?
q3.answer: The Placement Fee covers the professional work required to successfully connect and enroll a student in the right university program. This fee is variable and directly linked to the scholarship amount: the higher the placement fee, the lower your annual tuition.

q4.question: What is the Application Fee?
q4.answer: The Application Fee varies by university and is a required payment to formally process your application after you have been accepted. This amount confirms your intent to enroll and is managed directly by the platform. This fee is final and non-refundable.

q5.question: How do I choose my scholarship?
q5.answer: After paying the Selection Process and submitting your documents, our AI and support team will present the best scholarship options for your profile. You can then choose the one that best fits your budget and goals.

q6.question: Are there other fees I should know about?
q6.answer: All mandatory fees for your application and enrollment process are listed in your dashboard before any payment. Some universities may have additional fees (e.g., housing deposits, orientation fees), but these will always be communicated directly by the university or by us in advance. All fees are final and non-refundable.

q7.question: How can I pay these fees?
q7.answer: You can pay all fees directly through the MatriculaUSA platform using international credit or debit cards. Payments are processed securely via Stripe, and you will receive a confirmation for each transaction. All fees are final and non-refundable.

q8.question: Is my payment information secure?
q8.answer: Yes. All payments are processed by Stripe, a global leader in payment security. MatriculaUSA does not store your card details, and all transactions are encrypted for your protection.

q9.question: Can I get a refund?
q9.answer: You have the right to a full refund of the fees paid if your application is unsuccessful or you are not approved for a scholarship. However, if you withdraw from the process or change your mind after starting the application, the fees paid are non-refundable, as binary processing and support will have already begun. All fees are final and non-refundable.

q10.question: Do I have to pay all fees at once?
q10.answer: No. The fees are separate and paid in stages. You pay the Selection Process first, then the Application Fee (if applicable), and finally the Placement Fee associated with the chosen scholarship. All are mandatory but paid at different times.

q11.question: Who can I contact if I have questions about fees or payments?
q11.answer: Our support team is available via chat or email at any time to answer any questions about fees, payments, or your application process. We are here to help you every step of the way!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our selection process
faq.contact: Still have questions? Contact our support team

items.question: What is included in the selection process fee?
items.answer: $400 includes a full profile analysis, personalized AI scholarship search, applications to multiple universities, process monitoring, and support until approval.

items.question: What is the Placement Fee?
items.answer: The Placement Fee covers specialized support to secure your scholarship and enrollment. It refers to profile analysis, identification of best options, scholarship negotiation, and boarding support. It is variable and directly linked to the scholarship amount: the higher the placement fee, the lower your annual tuition.

items.question: Can I apply for as many scholarships as I want?
items.answer: Yes! With a single fee you can apply for all scholarships compatible with your profile. Our AI identifies the best opportunities and you choose how many you want to try.

items.question: How does the guarantee work?
items.answer: If you follow our full process and are not approved by any university, we refund 100% of the selection process fee. It's our guarantee of trust in the system.

items.question: Which universities participate?
items.answer: We work with more than 45 accredited American universities, including Arizona State University, Florida International University, University of California, and many others.

items.question: Do I need to speak English?
items.answer: Yes, a basic level of English is required. Some universities accept an internal proficiency test or offer preparatory programs for those who need to improve their language.

items.question: How long does it take to know if I was approved?
items.answer: The analysis and response process from universities varies from 2 to 8 weeks. You will receive constant updates on your application status.

step1.title: Welcome to Matrícula USA! 🎓
step1.description: We will guide you through the entire scholarship application process in the US. It's easier than you think!

step2.title: 1. Explore Scholarships
step2.description: Browse our scholarship list. Each one has detailed information about values, requirements, and partner universities. Click on those that interest you!

step3.title: 2. Add to Selection List
step3.description: Select the scholarships you want to apply for and add them to your selection list. You can choose multiple scholarships and manage your selections easily.

step4.title: 3. Upload Documents
step4.description: Upload your documents: Passport, High School Diploma, and a Bank Statement. Our team will review everything and give you feedback.

step5.title: 4. Placement Fee and Final Support
step5.description: After university approval, you proceed with the Placement Fee. This covers our professional services to secure your enrollment and support you until arrival.

step6.title: 5. Spot Guaranteed
step6.description: Once the process is complete, your spot is guaranteed and you are ready to start your American journey!
